name: HWM_TCD_EXP_DATA_SCH_SHFT
description: This table contains details for Time Clock Device export data for Schedule Shift

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Schedule shift identifier

columns.Name: SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: SHIFT_ID

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_ESS_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The process which generated the data.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_VERSION
columns.Comments: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_VERSION

columns.Name: LATEST_VERSION
columns.Comments: LATEST_VERSION

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Export or Collection Data Status

columns.Name: REC_TYPE
columns.Comments: REC_TYPE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_NAME
columns.Comments: Shift Name

columns.Name: START_EARLY_GRACE
columns.Comments: Grace period allowed before start time of the shift

columns.Name: START_LATE_GRACE
columns.Comments: Grace period allowed after start time of the shift

columns.Name: END_EARLY_GRACE
columns.Comments: Grace period allowed before end time of the shift

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of work

columns.Name: TIME_NOT_WORKED
columns.Comments: Time not worked

columns.Name: END_LATE_GRACE
columns.Comments: Grace period allowed after end time of the shift

columns.Name: TOLERANCE
columns.Comments: Threshold to ignore violation

columns.Name: START_EARLY_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Code used to indicate start early violation

columns.Name: START_LATE_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Code used to indicate start late violation

columns.Name: END_EARLY_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Code used to indicate end early violation

columns.Name: END_LATE_VIOLATION
columns.Comments: Code used to indicate end late violation

columns.Name: DELETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate deleted shift

columns.Name: SETUP_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: The setup profile id driving the export data collection.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise id

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
